name: create_canvas
description: Create a UI Canvas GameObject in the current scene. The Canvas is set up with a CanvasScaler (Scale With Screen Size, 1920x1080 reference) and a GraphicRaycaster. This is required before creating any UI elements.

name.description: The name of the Canvas GameObject. Default 'Canvas'.

sort_order.description: The sorting order of the Canvas. Default 0.

reference_resolution_x.description: The reference resolution width for the CanvasScaler. Default 1920.

reference_resolution_y.description: The reference resolution height for the CanvasScaler. Default 1080.

match_width_or_height.description: CanvasScaler match value (0 = match width, 1 = match height, 0.5 = match both). Default 0.5.
